amendment.description: An amendment numbered 14 printed in Part B of House Report 119-628 to direct the Secretary of Agriculture, in coordination with the Secretary of Health and Human Services, to develop a low-risk classification for fresh fruits, vegetables, and other foods that are typically consumed raw or with minimal processing.

vote.text: On agreeing to the Perez amendment (A009) Agreed to by voice vote.

action.text: House amendment agreed to: On agreeing to the Perez amendment (A009) Agreed to by voice vote.
